## Meeting Purpose

[Sprint check-in and progress update on Augment Code's marketing and content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New version of codelibrary.ai launching, featuring dark mode, search functionality, and a leaderboard](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Newsletter concept developed, focusing on curated engineering content with a skeptical but AI-forward angle](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Content strategy being developed, with a focus on creating educational guides separate from the main blog](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Prioritizing the creation of an education guide based on Daniel's internal course for legacy enterprise users](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)

## Topics

### CodeLibrary.ai Launch

  - [New version going live with dark mode, search functionality, and leaderboard](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Upload function for user-generated content in development](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Full list of MCP servers available for use](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Plan to create a version on mccode.com with one-click add to Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Content to be scrubbed of Cursor mentions for Augment-hosted version](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Newsletter Development

  - [Concept: Curated content for experienced, somewhat skeptical but AI-forward engineers](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Sections include full reads with TLDR takeaways, CTAs, and a "skeptical engineer's take" on AI news](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Database of engineering blogs and respected personal blogs being curated](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Aim to balance skepticism without being anti-code generation](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Beehive account set up with capacity for up to 200,000 subscribers (aiming for 500,000)](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Developing content OS with sample articles and topics](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Focus on bottom-of-funnel content for the website](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Plan to create a new section (e.g., /library or /guides) separate from the main blog](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Need to set up Search Console access and analytics for baseline metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Goal to publish first article next week and start ranking from there](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

### Education Guide Priority

  - [Repurposing Daniel's internal course on using Augment Code for legacy enterprise users](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)
  - [Aim to include as part of the upcoming launch week in about three weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Combine internal knowledge with insights from principal engineers who've gone through the process](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow up with specific asks and action items for each workstream](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Create new website section for guides/library, duplicating blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Molisha to provide subscriber list details (opt-in method, messaging history, open/click rates)](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Prioritize development of education guide based on Daniel's internal course](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Continue refining newsletter concept and adding relevant sources](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Set up Search Console access and analytics for Augment Code website](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Aim to publish first content piece in the new guides/library section next week](https://fathom.video/share/xm32q99eyXxasMNmPaVUdsLWqTsxf8NU?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
